free_text: Activation of natural Hf and Ta in relation to the
production of 177Lu
Experiment performed with proton beam
at the Brookhaven Linac Isotope Producer (BLIP)
Tantalum (0.42 g/cm2, 99.9%+) and Hf (0.33 g/cm2, 2%
Zr, 98% Hf, purity of Hf component 99.5%) foils were
used in a stacked target.  The stacked target
foils (diameter cca 6.9 cm) were attached to
aluminum backing and positioned in target assembly
with Ta foil facing upstream. A copper monitor foil
was sandwiched between the target foils in each case.
for E=108 and 195 MeV
cross sections data taken from from
Appl.Radiat.Isot.43(1992)1019
for E=195 MeV
for E=195 MeV
irradiations. Cross sections data taken from
Ann.Rev.Nucl.Sci. 13(1963)261 and
no information given
